title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 191.692 - Premarital HIV testing, rulemaking authorized, when
text:
191.692.  Premarital HIV testing, rulemaking authorized, when. — The department of health and senior services may promulgate rules providing for mandatory premarital HIV testing if the Centers for Disease Control so indicates.
(L. 1988 H.B. 1151 & 1044 § 12) 
Effective 6-1-88
